name: Lenoir Mulberry Recreation Center
description: Lenoir Mulberry Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lenoir, NC. There are 15 wood courts. 3 are indoors and 12 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Shuford Recreation Center
description: Shuford Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Granite Falls, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
